heroSubtitle: A calm space for journaling your journeys, organizing steps, and keeping focus with categories and favorites.
suitsTitle: BUILT FOR FOCUS. DESIGNED FOR CALM.

features.journeyBody: Record your readings step by step. Keep a living log of your tarot journey over time.
features.categoriesBody: Organize by energy, love, nature, work and more. Star what matters most.
features.aiBody: Get a personalized AI reading that considers your full journey context and intentions.
